scripts.ios: cross-env ENVFILE=.env.development ruby ./node_modules/react-native-config/ios/ReactNativeConfig/BuildXCConfig.rb . ios/tmp.xcconfig && cp .env.development .env && cross-env ENVFILE=.env.development react-native run-ios --scheme Development --mode DebugDev --simulator "iPhone 17"
scripts.ios:dev: cross-env ENVFILE=.env.development ruby ./node_modules/react-native-config/ios/ReactNativeConfig/BuildXCConfig.rb . ios/tmp.xcconfig && cp .env.development .env && cross-env ENVFILE=.env.development react-native run-ios --scheme Development --mode DebugDev --simulator "iPhone 17"
scripts.ios:staging: cross-env ENVFILE=.env.staging ruby ./node_modules/react-native-config/ios/ReactNativeConfig/BuildXCConfig.rb . ios/tmp.xcconfig && cp .env.staging .env && cross-env ENVFILE=.env.staging react-native run-ios --scheme Staging --mode DebugStag --simulator "iPhone 17"
scripts.ios:production: cross-env ENVFILE=.env.production ruby ./node_modules/react-native-config/ios/ReactNativeConfig/BuildXCConfig.rb . ios/tmp.xcconfig && cp .env.production .env && cross-env ENVFILE=.env.production react-native run-ios --scheme Production --mode DebugProd --simulator "iPhone 17"
scripts.pod:clean: cd ios && pod deintegrate && rm -rf ~/Library/Caches/CocoaPods && rm -rf Pods && rm -rf ~/Library/Developer/Xcode/DerivedData/* && rm -rf Podfile.lock
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules && rm -rf yarn.lock && rm -rf package-lock.json && watchman watch-del-all
